nodes.name: Cron — Hourly
nodes.notes: Every hour — classifies unclassified emails in raw_emails.

parameters.query: SELECT id, sender, subject, body FROM raw_emails WHERE classification IS NULL ORDER BY received_at DESC LIMIT 20;

nodes.name: Classify via Claude
nodes.notes: Claude classifies each email. Categories: client, supplier, internal, marketing, spam, personal.

parameters.query: UPDATE raw_emails SET classification = $1 WHERE id = $2;
INSERT INTO workflow_logs (workflow_name, status, output_summary, completed_at) VALUES ('email_classification', 'completed', $1, NOW());

INSERT INTO health_checks (component, last_run, status, message) VALUES ('email_classification', NOW(), 'ok', $1) ON CONFLICT (component) DO UPDATE SET last_run = EXCLUDED.last_run, status = EXCLUDED.status, message = EXCLUDED.message;

meta.description: Hourly email classification using Claude API. Classifies raw_emails into: client, supplier, internal, marketing, spam, personal. From original Phase 0 Build Manual.
